deliverable_target: a faithful, source-conscious chapter sequence for Ending All Fear, preserving Krishnamurti's inquiry into fear, meditation, violence, pleasure, and freedom from psychological dependence.
visual_target: selected frames are supporting evidence for speaker identity, audience setting, and official titling; do not let them override the spoken content.
mathematical_standard: preserve conceptual precision and distinctions, but avoid invented formal psychology or philosophy beyond the source.
style_target: notes should read like a careful companion text on fear, disorder, pleasure, meditation, and freedom, with explicit separation between direct claim, question, and interpretation.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to J. Krishnamurti, the Krishnamurti Foundation Trust, and curation by LazyingArt LLC.
front_matter_single: Original talk by J. Krishnamurti. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original talks by J. Krishnamurti. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
reference_missing_text: No directly matching reference PDF is available for this course.
reference_no_match_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no strong topical excerpt was automatically matched for this talk.
reference_budget_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no excerpt fit within the current prompt budget.
